testimonials.t1: Biscuit passed away last year. Seeing her immortalized in a Renaissance portrait brought me to tears. It hangs above my bed now — she looks like the queen she always was.
testimonials.t2: I surprised my girlfriend with a pop art portrait of Luna for her birthday. She literally screamed when she opened it. Best €15 I ever spent.
testimonials.t3: Milo is the most unphotogenic cat alive, but somehow the watercolor style captured his soul perfectly. I ordered a canvas print — museum-worthy.
testimonials.t4: Whiskers has this grumpy little face that no camera ever captures right. The oil painting style nailed his personality in a way photos never could.
testimonials.t5: My mum lost her dog Bella two months ago. I created a Renaissance portrait as a Christmas gift. She couldn't stop crying. It's her most treasured possession now.
testimonials.t6: Coco is a tiny chihuahua with the attitude of a lion. The Art Nouveau style made her look exactly like she sees herself — regal and unstoppable.

faq.label: Support
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Artlypet
faq.a1: Simply upload a clear photo of your pet, choose an artistic style from our curated collection, and our AI will generate a stunning portrait in under 60 seconds. You can then download your high-resolution masterpiece or order a physical print.
faq.q2: What resolution are the generated images?
faq.a2: All generated portraits are produced in 2K resolution, suitable for digital display and high-quality printing up to large canvas sizes.
faq.q3: How long are generated images available?
faq.a3: Generated images are stored for 30 days. We recommend downloading your portraits as soon as they're ready. You can always regenerate using another credit.
faq.a4: Yes! We offer museum-quality canvas prints shipped across the EU. After generating your portrait, you can order a print directly from your dashboard.
faq.q5: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a5: We accept all major credit and debit cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and other local payment methods through our secure Stripe checkout.
faq.q6: What if the AI generation fails?
faq.a6: If a generation fails for any reason, your credit is automatically refunded. You can try again with the same or a different photo.
faq.a7: Yes, you can delete your account at any time from your dashboard settings. All your data, including uploaded photos and generated portraits, will be permanently removed in compliance with GDPR.

blog.best_ai_pet_portrait_apps_2026_content:
What Are AI Pet Portrait Apps?

AI pet portrait apps use artificial intelligence to transform ordinary pet photos into stunning artistic portraits. These tools analyze your pet's features — eyes, fur texture, pose — and recreate them in styles ranging from Renaissance oil paintings to modern pop art.

In 2026, the technology has reached a point where AI-generated pet portraits are virtually indistinguishable from hand-painted artwork, at a fraction of the cost and time.

Top AI Pet Portrait Apps Compared

1. Artlypet — Best Overall

Artlypet leads the market with 12+ curated art styles, 2K resolution output, and results in under 60 seconds. The free tier includes 3 portraits, and the Premium plan (€15 one-time) offers 50 portraits in full HD with no watermarks.

  • Styles: 12+ (Oil Painting, Watercolor, Renaissance, Pop Art, Art Nouveau, Impressionist, and more)
  • Speed: Under 60 seconds
  • Resolution: 2K HD
  • Pricing: Free to start, Premium €15 one-time
  • Prints: Museum-quality canvas prints from €59.90

2. Lensa AI

Known for its Magic Avatars feature, Lensa focuses on human portraits but offers limited pet options. Quality varies significantly depending on the source photo, and the subscription model makes it more expensive for occasional use.

3. Prisma

One of the earliest AI art apps, Prisma applies style transfer filters but lacks the sophistication of dedicated pet portrait tools. The results often look more like filters than true artwork.

4. StarryAI

A text-to-image generator that can create pet art from descriptions, but requires more effort and iteration than photo-based tools. Results are less consistent for pet likenesses.

5. NightCafe

NightCafe offers multiple AI algorithms and a credit-based system. While versatile, it's a general-purpose art tool rather than a pet portrait specialist, so results require more manual tweaking.

What to Look For in an AI Pet Portrait App

When choosing an AI pet portrait tool, consider these factors:

  • Style variety: More styles means more creative options for capturing your pet's personality
  • Output quality: Look for at least 2K resolution for printing on canvas or framing
  • Speed: The best tools deliver in under 2 minutes — no waiting days for results
  • Pricing transparency: Avoid subscription traps — one-time payments offer better value
  • Print options: Built-in canvas printing saves time and ensures color accuracy
  • Pet-specific training: Tools trained specifically on pet imagery produce far better results

Why Artlypet Wins for Pet Owners

While general-purpose AI art tools can produce interesting results, a purpose-built pet portrait app like Artlypet delivers consistently superior quality. The AI has been specifically trained to capture pet features — eyes, whiskers, fur texture — with remarkable accuracy across every art style.

The combination of speed (under 60 seconds), quality (2K HD), pricing (3 free portraits to start), and built-in canvas printing makes Artlypet the clear leader for pet owners who want gallery-worthy results without the gallery price tag.

Frequently Asked Questions

How much do AI pet portraits cost?

Most AI pet portrait apps offer free trials. Premium options range from €5-30. Artlypet offers 3 free portraits and a €15 one-time Premium plan with 50 portraits — that's just €0.30 per portrait.

Are AI pet portraits good enough for printing?

Yes — modern AI portrait generators produce 2K+ resolution images that print beautifully on canvas up to 70×100cm. Artlypet's output is specifically optimized for print quality.

How long does it take to create an AI pet portrait?

Most tools generate portraits in 30-90 seconds. Artlypet delivers results in under 60 seconds from the moment you tap generate.

Can I use AI pet portraits commercially?

This varies by platform. With Artlypet Premium, you receive full rights to use your generated portraits for personal and gift purposes. For commercial use, check the Terms of Service.
blog.pet_portrait_gift_ideas_content:
Why Pet Portraits Make the Perfect Gift

A personalized pet portrait is one of the most thoughtful gifts you can give to any animal lover. It shows you care about what matters most to them — their beloved companion. Whether it's a birthday, anniversary, memorial, or just because, an AI-generated pet portrait is unique, personal, and unforgettable.

Unlike generic gifts, a custom pet portrait captures the specific animal someone loves. It's a one-of-a-kind piece of art that will be treasured for years.

10 Creative Pet Portrait Gift Ideas

1. Classic Oil Painting Portrait

Transform their pet into a regal subject worthy of a museum gallery. The oil painting style adds rich textures and golden tones that look stunning on canvas. This is the most popular gift choice for a reason — it's timeless.

2. Pop Art Collection

Create a set of 4 pop art portraits in different color schemes — perfect for a gallery wall arrangement. Bold, colorful, and eye-catching, pop art portraits work brilliantly in modern interiors.

3. Renaissance Noble Portrait

Dress their pet in historical attire with dramatic lighting. The Renaissance style makes any pet look like aristocracy — dogs especially look majestic in this style.

4. Watercolor for Pet Memorial

The soft, ethereal quality of watercolor creates a beautiful tribute to a beloved pet who has passed. Gentle, respectful, and deeply moving. Many customers tell us this is the most meaningful gift they've ever given.

5. Matching Owner + Pet Portrait

Use the Mix mode to create a portrait of the owner and pet together in the same artistic style. Truly unique and guaranteed to become a conversation piece.

6. Canvas Print for Their Home

Order a museum-quality canvas print that arrives ready to hang. Available in sizes from 30×40cm to 70×100cm. No framing needed — it arrives stretched on a wooden frame.

7. Art Nouveau Greeting Card

Download the digital portrait and print it as a high-quality greeting card. The Art Nouveau style's flowing lines and decorative elements make beautiful card designs that double as keepsakes.

8. Pet Portrait Calendar

Create 12 portraits in different styles — one for each month. A gift that keeps giving all year and showcases the incredible variety of art styles available.

9. Impressionist Garden Scene

The Impressionist style captures dappled light and outdoor beauty — perfect if the pet loves garden time. The soft brushstrokes and warm palette create a dreamy, nostalgic mood.

10. Digital Portrait Gift Card

Not sure which style they'd prefer? Gift them an Artlypet credit package so they can choose themselves. Available in Starter (2 credits), Bundle (10 credits), and Collection (20 credits) options.

How to Order a Pet Portrait as a Gift

  1. Ask for a clear photo of their pet (or find one on social media)
  2. Upload to Artlypet and choose a style that matches their personality
  3. Download in HD or order a canvas print shipped directly to their address
  4. Present it at the occasion — watch their reaction!

Gift-Giving Occasions for Pet Portraits

  • Birthdays: A personal, thoughtful gift for any pet lover
  • Christmas: Unique stocking filler (digital) or statement gift (canvas)
  • Pet memorials: A lasting tribute to a beloved companion
  • New pet: Celebrate the arrival of a new family member
  • Housewarming: A ready-to-hang piece of personalized art
  • Just because: Sometimes the best gifts are unexpected

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I create a pet portrait from someone else's photo?

Yes! As long as you have a clear photo of the pet, you can create a portrait. Many people use photos from social media or ask the owner for a picture under a casual pretext.

How long does it take to receive a canvas print?

Canvas prints ship within 7-10 business days across the EU, with free shipping on orders over €50. Plan ahead for special occasions!

What if I'm not happy with the result?

You can regenerate with a different style or photo — each generation costs just 1 credit. Most people find their perfect portrait within 2-3 tries.
blog.how_ai_creates_pet_portraits_content:
The Technology Behind AI Pet Portraits

AI pet portrait generation uses a combination of computer vision, deep learning, and generative AI to transform photographs into artwork. The process is far more sophisticated than simple photo filters — the AI actually repaints your pet from scratch in the chosen artistic style. Here's a detailed look at how it works.

Step 1: Image Analysis

When you upload a pet photo, the AI first analyzes the image to identify key features: the pet's face, eyes, ears, fur texture, body posture, and background elements. Advanced models can distinguish between hundreds of dog breeds, cat varieties, and other animals, adjusting their approach accordingly.

This analysis phase is crucial because it determines what the AI will preserve (your pet's unique likeness) and what it will transform (the artistic style and rendering).

Step 2: Style Understanding

Each art style has been trained on thousands of real artworks. The AI has learned the characteristics that define each style:

  • Oil Painting: Thick brushstrokes, rich color depth, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, warm golden undertones
  • Watercolor: Transparent washes, soft edges, flowing color transitions, white space utilization
  • Pop Art: Bold outlines, flat color areas, high contrast, halftone dot patterns
  • Renaissance: Chiaroscuro lighting, detailed textures, formal composition, rich fabric rendering
  • Art Nouveau: Organic flowing lines, decorative borders, natural motifs, muted jewel tones
  • Impressionist: Visible brushstrokes, dappled light effects, vibrant complementary colors

Step 3: Generative AI Transformation

The core technology uses a multimodal generative AI model. Unlike early style transfer apps that simply blended textures over your photo, modern systems actually understand the content of the image and regenerate it entirely in the target style.

The AI takes the content of your photo (your pet's likeness, pose, and expression) and creates a brand-new image that faithfully represents your pet while exhibiting all the visual characteristics of the chosen art style. This is why the results look like genuine artwork rather than filtered photos.

Step 4: Refinement and Detail Preservation

The raw output goes through multiple refinement passes to ensure critical details are preserved. The AI pays special attention to:

  • Eyes: The most expressive feature — sharpened and enhanced to maintain your pet's personality
  • Fur texture: Rendered differently per style (smooth in watercolor, textured in oil painting)
  • Distinctive markings: Spots, patches, and color patterns that make your pet recognizable
  • Expression: The emotional quality of the original photo is preserved in the artistic rendering

Step 5: Upscaling to Print Quality

The final image is upscaled to 2K resolution (2048×2048 pixels) using AI super-resolution technology. This ensures your portrait is sharp and detailed enough for high-quality canvas printing at sizes up to 70×100cm.

Why 2026-Era AI Portraits Are So Impressive

The quality leap from early style transfer apps to today's generative AI portraits is enormous. Three key advances make the difference:

  1. Multimodal understanding: The AI understands both visual content and artistic intent
  2. Pet-specific training: Models trained on pet imagery produce dramatically better likenesses
  3. Iterative refinement: Multiple passes ensure detail preservation and style consistency

The result is artwork that could pass for hand-painted by a professional artist — delivered in under 60 seconds.

Frequently Asked Questions

Is AI art as good as hand-painted portraits?

For most people, yes. AI-generated portraits in 2026 are virtually indistinguishable from hand-painted work, especially in styles like oil painting and watercolor. The main difference is time (60 seconds vs weeks) and cost (€15 vs €200+).

Does the AI copy existing artwork?

No. The AI generates entirely new images. It has learned artistic styles from training data but creates unique compositions for each portrait. Every output is a one-of-a-kind piece.

What happens to my photos after generation?

Your uploaded photos are used only for portrait generation and stored securely for 30 days. You can delete them at any time from your dashboard. We never use customer photos for training. See our Privacy Policy for full details.
blog.oil_painting_vs_watercolor_pet_portraits:
Choosing the Right Style for Your Pet

Oil painting and watercolor are the two most popular styles for pet portraits, but they create very different moods and visual effects. Choosing the right one can make the difference between a good portrait and a perfect one. Here's a detailed guide to help you decide which style suits your pet best.

Oil Painting: Bold, Rich, Dramatic

The oil painting style produces portraits with deep, saturated colors, visible brushstrokes, and dramatic lighting. It's the classic choice for a formal, gallery-worthy look that commands attention.

Best for:

  • Pets with strong, distinctive features — bold markings, expressive eyes, muscular build
  • Dark-furred animals (the golden undertones and warm lighting pop beautifully against dark fur)
  • Formal, regal compositions — if your pet has a dignified bearing, oil painting amplifies it
  • Large canvas prints (the visible brushstroke texture looks incredible at scale)
  • Dogs — the warmth and depth of oil painting particularly complements canine features

Oil painting also works wonderfully for multi-pet households. The rich backgrounds and warm tones unify the composition beautifully when using the Mix mode.

Watercolor: Soft, Ethereal, Gentle

Watercolor creates portraits with transparent color washes, soft edges, and a dreamy quality. It's the perfect choice for a more delicate, artistic feel that evokes emotion and tenderness.

Best for:

  • Light-colored or white pets — the transparency of watercolor lets pale fur glow
  • Cats — the soft, flowing style captures feline grace and elegance perfectly
  • Memorial portraits — gentle, respectful, and deeply moving
  • Smaller prints or greeting cards — watercolor looks beautiful at any size
  • Pets with soft, fluffy fur — the flowing washes complement texture wonderfully

Side-by-Side Comparison

FeatureOil PaintingWatercolor
Color depthRich, saturatedSoft, transparent
MoodDramatic, formalGentle, dreamy
Best for printingLarge canvas (50cm+)Any size
Detail levelHigh — every whiskerMedium — artistic softness
Best pet typeDogs, dark furCats, light fur
BackgroundDark, dramaticLight, airy
Gift appealStatement pieceSentimental, personal

Other Styles Worth Considering

While oil painting and watercolor are the most popular choices, don't overlook these other styles:

  • Renaissance: If you love oil painting but want even more drama and historical flair
  • Pop Art: For a fun, modern alternative that works great as a set of prints
  • Art Nouveau: A beautiful middle ground — decorative and elegant, with flowing lines
  • Impressionist: Similar warmth to oil painting but with a lighter, more spontaneous feel

Our Recommendation

If you're unsure, try both! With Artlypet's free tier, you can create portraits in multiple styles and compare before ordering a print. Most pet owners end up loving both and ordering a set — one oil painting for the living room, one watercolor for the bedroom.

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I try both styles on the same photo?

Yes! Upload your photo once and generate portraits in as many styles as you like. Each generation costs 1 credit, and you get 3 free credits when you sign up.

Which style prints better on canvas?

Both print beautifully, but oil painting style has a slight edge on very large canvases (70×100cm) because the visible brushstroke texture adds physical depth at scale. Watercolor shines on smaller, more intimate sizes.

Can I mix styles in a single portrait?

Each portrait uses one style, but you can create multiple versions of the same photo in different styles and display them together for a stunning gallery wall effect.
blog.canvas_print_guide_pet_portraits_content:
Why Canvas Prints Are the Best Way to Display Pet Portraits

A digital pet portrait is beautiful on screen, but there's something magical about seeing it printed on museum-quality canvas, hanging on your wall. Canvas prints add texture, depth, and permanence to your AI-generated artwork. They transform a digital file into a tangible piece of art that you'll enjoy every day.

Choosing the Right Size

The right size depends on your space and how you want the portrait to feel in the room. Here's a guide to each option:

30×40cm — Desk and Shelf

Perfect for a bedside table, bookshelf, or small wall space. This intimate size is great as a gift that doesn't require specific wall space. It works well in offices, hallways, and smaller rooms.

50×70cm — Statement Wall Piece

The most popular size. Large enough to be a focal point in any room, but not overwhelming. Ideal for living rooms, hallways, and above furniture like sofas and consoles. This is the size most customers choose for their first canvas print.

70×100cm — Gallery Statement

For pet owners who want their furry friend to be the star of the room. This size commands attention and works best in larger spaces — living rooms, dining areas, and wide hallways. The 2K resolution of Artlypet portraits ensures sharp detail even at this size.

Print Quality: What to Expect

Artlypet canvas prints are produced with premium materials and professional finishing:

  • Premium cotton-blend canvas: Acid-free, archival-grade material with a fine art texture that enhances the portrait
  • Archival inks: Giclée-quality pigment inks with 75+ year fade resistance — your portrait will look vivid for decades
  • Gallery wrap: The image wraps seamlessly around the edges for a clean, frameless look — no additional framing needed
  • Ready to hang: Pre-stretched on a solid wooden frame with mounting hardware included. Open the box, hang it up — that's it
  • Protective coating: A satin finish protects against UV damage, dust, and moisture

Which Art Style Works Best on Canvas?

All of our art styles print beautifully, but some are particularly impressive on canvas:

  • Oil Painting: The rich textures and brushstrokes gain a physical quality on canvas that's almost indistinguishable from real paint
  • Renaissance: The dramatic lighting and formal composition command presence on a large canvas
  • Impressionist: The dappled light and warm colors create a living, breathing quality at scale
  • Pop Art: Bold colors and clean lines make a striking modern statement — great for gallery walls

Caring for Your Canvas Print

  • Avoid direct sunlight to prevent fading (though archival inks are highly UV-resistant)
  • Dust gently with a soft, dry cloth every few months
  • Keep away from moisture and high humidity (bathrooms, kitchens)
  • No glass needed — canvas is durable and the protective coating handles everyday exposure
  • Avoid touching the printed surface with fingers — oils can affect the finish over time

Pricing and Shipping

Canvas prints start at €59.90 for Premium members and €79.90 for free plan users. All sizes include free shipping on orders over €50 within the EU.

  • 30×40cm: From €59.90
  • 50×70cm: From €79.90
  • 70×100cm: From €99.90

All prints are carefully packaged in reinforced boxes with corner protectors to ensure they arrive in perfect condition.

Frequently Asked Questions

How long does shipping take?

Canvas prints ship within 7-10 business days across the EU. All prints are carefully packaged and shipped with tracking. You'll receive a notification when your print is on its way.

Can I order a print from a watermarked preview?

You'll need to unlock HD first (€4.90 per image) or upgrade to Premium (€15 for all images in HD). Only HD-quality images can be printed — this ensures your canvas looks crisp and detailed at any size.

What if my print arrives damaged?

We guarantee satisfaction. If your print arrives damaged, contact us with a photo and we'll send a replacement free of charge. Contact our support team for assistance.

Can I order multiple prints at once?

Yes! Many customers order sets of 2-3 prints in different styles for a gallery wall arrangement. Orders over €50 include free shipping.
blog.pet_photography_tips_ai_portraits_conten:
Better Photos Equal Better AI Portraits

The quality of your AI pet portrait depends heavily on the quality of the source photo. The AI uses the details in your photo — lighting, sharpness, expression — to create the final artwork. A great photo produces a stunning portrait; a poor photo limits what the AI can achieve. Follow these 5 tips to get the best possible result every time.

Tip 1: Use Natural Daylight

Natural light is the single biggest factor in photo quality. It produces even, flattering illumination that reveals your pet's true colors and features. Shoot near a window or outdoors in the shade for soft, directional light.

Avoid:

  • Camera flash — causes red-eye, flat lighting, and harsh shadows
  • Direct harsh sunlight — causes squinting and high-contrast shadows
  • Indoor overhead lighting — creates unflattering shadows under the eyes

Best time: Morning or late afternoon for warm, soft, golden-hour light. Overcast days are also excellent — the clouds act as a natural diffuser.

Tip 2: Get the Face in Focus

The AI pays most attention to your pet's face, especially the eyes. Make sure the face is clearly visible, well-lit, and in sharp focus. On your smartphone, tap on your pet's face on the screen to set the focus point.

Aim for the eyes to be at the same level as your camera (or slightly below). Getting down to your pet's eye level produces much more engaging photos than shooting from above.

Tip 3: Keep the Background Simple

A busy background confuses the AI and can reduce portrait quality. The algorithm works best when it can clearly distinguish your pet from the surroundings.

Good backgrounds:

  • Plain walls (any color)
  • Grass or simple outdoor settings
  • Solid-colored furniture or blankets
  • Blurred backgrounds (portrait mode on your phone)

Avoid: Cluttered rooms, patterned carpets, busy outdoor scenes with many objects.

Tip 4: Capture Their Personality

The best portraits capture your pet's unique character. The AI preserves the expression and energy of the original photo, so the mood of your source image carries through to the final artwork.

  • Playful pets: Catch them mid-action with ears perked and mouth open
  • Dignified pets: Wait for a calm, poised moment with a steady gaze
  • Curious pets: Catch that head-tilt moment with attentive eyes
  • Sleepy pets: A serene, drowsy expression makes beautiful watercolor portraits

Tip 5: Resolution Matters

Use a photo that's at least 500×500 pixels for acceptable results, though 1000×1000 or higher is ideal. Most modern smartphone cameras far exceed this requirement.

Important: Avoid heavily compressed images from messaging apps (WhatsApp, Messenger). These apps reduce image quality significantly. Always use the original from your camera roll for the best AI portrait results.

Quick Checklist Before Uploading

  • Natural light (no flash)
  • Face clearly visible and well-lit
  • Simple, uncluttered background
  • Sharp focus on eyes
  • High resolution (original from camera)
  • Photo is right-side up (not rotated)

Common Mistakes to Avoid

  • Blurry photos: If the photo is blurry, the portrait will lack detail — no amount of AI can invent sharpness that isn't there
  • Multiple pets in frame: For single mode, use a photo with only one pet clearly visible. Use Mix mode for multiple subjects
  • Heavy filters: Instagram filters, beauty modes, and other edits can confuse the AI. Use an unedited photo
  • Extreme close-ups: Include at least the full head and some of the body for the best composition

Ready to try? Upload your first photo and see the difference a good source image makes.

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I use a photo from social media?

You can, but social media platforms compress images heavily. For best results, use the original photo from your camera roll or ask the pet owner to send the original via email or AirDrop.

What if my pet won't stay still?

Use burst mode on your phone camera — take 20+ shots quickly and pick the sharpest one. Treats, toys, and unusual sounds help grab their attention for that perfect moment.

Do I need a professional camera?

Not at all. Any modern smartphone camera (iPhone, Samsung, Pixel) produces more than enough quality for excellent AI portraits. The tips above matter far more than the camera you use.
blog.why_pet_owners_love_artlypet_content:
From Skeptics to Superfans: Real Artlypet Stories

When we launched Artlypet, we weren't sure if pet owners would trust AI with their beloved companions' portraits. Could a machine really capture the personality and soul of a pet? The response has been overwhelming — over 10,000 pet owners across Europe have created portraits, and the stories they share remind us every day why we built this.

What Our Users Say

"I couldn't believe how realistic it looked"

Sophie from Berlin uploaded a photo of her golden retriever Max and chose the oil painting style. "The result was jaw-dropping. Max looks like a true aristocrat. The way it captured the light in his eyes — I thought it was painted by a real artist. I ordered a 50×70cm canvas print and it's now the centerpiece of our living room. Guests always ask where we got it."

"The perfect gift for my mother"

Chiara from Rome created a Renaissance portrait of her family's Labrador as a birthday gift for her mother. "She cried tears of joy. It's hanging in her hallway now and every visitor asks about it. I've since made portraits for three friends as Christmas gifts — everyone is amazed."

"Better than a professional painter"

David from London had previously commissioned a hand-painted portrait for £300 and waited 4 weeks. "The Artlypet version was just as good, if not better. And it took 60 seconds instead of nearly a month. I've since created portraits of all three of our cats in different art styles — oil painting, watercolor, and art nouveau."

"A beautiful memorial for my dog"

Maria from Madrid lost her beloved rescue dog Luna last year. "Creating a watercolor portrait of Luna was incredibly emotional but also healing. The soft, gentle style captured her sweet personality perfectly. It hangs in my bedroom and I see her every morning. I'm so grateful this exists."

"My kids love the pop art versions"

Thomas from Amsterdam created pop art portraits of the family cat for his children's rooms. "They absolutely love them. Each kid has a different color version in their bedroom. It's become a conversation starter with every playdate — and now half the parents at school want one too."

Why Artlypet Stands Out

Pet owners consistently mention the same reasons for choosing Artlypet:

  • Speed: 60 seconds vs weeks for traditional commissioned portraits
  • Price: €15 for 50 Premium portraits vs €200+ for one hand-painted piece
  • Quality: 2K resolution output, virtually indistinguishable from hand-painted artwork
  • Variety: 12+ curated art styles — experiment until you find the perfect one
  • Prints: Museum-quality canvas prints delivered to your door across the EU
  • No risk: 3 free portraits to try before committing — no credit card needed

The Numbers Speak for Themselves

  • 10,000+ pet owners served across Europe
  • 4.9/5 average customer rating
  • 12+ curated art styles available
  • 5,000+ canvas prints delivered
  • 5 languages supported (English, Italian, German, French, Spanish)
  • 60 seconds average generation time

Join the Community

Every day, pet owners across Europe are discovering the joy of seeing their beloved companions transformed into works of art. Whether it's a playful pop art print for the kids' room or an elegant oil painting for the living room, there's a style for every pet and every home.

The best part? You can try it right now, for free. Sign up for Artlypet, get 3 free portrait credits, and see your pet as you've never seen them before.

Frequently Asked Questions

Is Artlypet available in my country?

Artlypet is available worldwide for digital portraits. Canvas print delivery is currently available across the EU, with international shipping coming soon.

Can I try before I buy?

Absolutely! Sign up for free and get 3 portrait credits — no credit card needed. You can see the quality before deciding to upgrade to Premium.

What pets can I create portraits of?

Dogs, cats, rabbits, birds, horses — our AI works with virtually any pet. Dogs and cats produce the most consistent results, but we've seen beautiful portraits of everything from hamsters to iguanas.
